chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-738 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.3322/2020 2. For orders on office objection(s) 3. For orders on M.A No.3323/2020 4. For hearing of main case 05.08.2020 Mr. Ali Shehzad Memon, advocate for petitioner *** 1. Urgent application is disposed of. 2to4. On Court query learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to satisfy this Court as to how the impugned order, which has been passed by Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate-I Digri, can be assailed through this constitution petition although remedy is available to him to challenge the said order before the concerned District and Sessions Judge. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
